venue_name: Bethel Woods Center for the Arts
notes:
Events are rendered as server-side HTML inside
cards within
. Each card duplicates title/date in a thumb block and an info block. Titles live in

TITLE

. Dates live in
— either a free-text range (e.g. 'April 1 - December 31', 'May 30 & 31') or a structured with weekday/month/day spans. JSON-LD on the page is only an Organization block (no Event objects). A 'More Events' button exists but is disabled in this snapshot, so only the 6 visible events are extracted. Friday May 29 / Saturday May 30 line up with year 2026, and the museum run is dated 2026, so all starts_at are inferred as 2026 in America/New_York. Dates lack times on this listing page, so starts_at uses 00:00 local (-04:00 EDT in late May, -05:00 EST otherwise). The Museum entry is a date range and Rock Band Jam is a monthly recurring program — flagged via recurrence_text.
